name: A Sussex Garden Companion
description: An illustrated companion to the most beautiful gardens, nurseries, and green spaces across Sussex — from the High Weald to the chalk downlands.
longDescription: From the South Downs to the coast, Sussex is home to some of England's most remarkable gardens. This illustrated companion features 50+ gardens including 15th-century aristocratic estates, contemporary designs, rose gardens, cottage gardens, and historic orchards — from the High Weald in the east to the fertile greensands in the west.
writerBio: Natasha contributes to Gardens Illustrated, House & Garden, and Country Life.
illustratorBio: Ruby Taylor works with Google, L'Occitane, HarperCollins, and the Victoria and Albert Museum.
specs: Beautifully illustrated folded map in slip case
Produced in the UK to ISO14001 environmental standards
